h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's step-by-step instructions to verify and ink the time signature.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only follows the tutor's step-by-step instructions and does not perform any new independent task or demonstrate an actional breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The learner is fully compliant and correct, so there is no pressure or trigger for the tutor to adapt or reverse strategy.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only follows the tutor's step-by-step instructions and does not perform any new independent task or demonstrate an actional breakthrough.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The learner is fully compliant and correct, so there is no pressure or trigger for the tutor to adapt or reverse strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The learner is fully compliant and correct, so there is no pressure or trigger for the tutor to adapt or reverse strategy.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner systematically works through sorting labels and placing arrows based on physical sources rather than motion.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left. Motion card stays down.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the slip cue to determine the correct direction of the friction force, moving past the potential confusion of using the travel arrow.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left. Motion card stays down.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully applies the slip cue to determine the correct direction of the friction force, moving past the potential confusion of using the travel arrow.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
